name: Zoho CRM
one_liner: Cloud CRM platform for managing leads, contacts, accounts, deals, and sales automation within the Zoho suite.
primary_auth: OAuth2 authorization-code grant with refresh tokens (access token sent as Zoho-oauthtoken header)
access_notes: Register a client in the Zoho API Console for free to get Client ID/Secret; the free CRM edition (up to 3 users) includes API access with 5,000 API credits/day, and Zoho also offers a free full-featured Developer Edition, so working credentials require no payment or approval.
api_notes: Versioned REST API (currently v8) spanning Metadata, Core CRUD on standard and custom modules, Composite (batch), asynchronous Bulk read/write, Notification (change events), and COQL Query APIs, plus a GraphQL option and official SDKs; well over 100 documented operations.
mcp_notes: Zoho ships four official, cloud-hosted MCP servers for CRM (Data Insights, Data Operations, Module Customization, Workflow & Process Automation) using OAuth login and standard API credits, documented at zoho.com/crm/developer/docs/mcp/overview.html; multiple community servers also exist.
main_blocker: None (free-edition cap of 5,000 API credits/day is the only constraint for heavy testing)

evidence.claim: Zoho CRM v8 API authenticates exclusively via OAuth 2.0, with 1-hour access tokens and long-lived refresh tokens passed as Zoho-oauthtoken
The v8 API reference documents Metadata, Core CRUD, Composite, Bulk, Notification, and Query API groups, including change-notification capability
The Free edition includes API access with 5,000 API credits per 24 hours; trial editions get the same limits as their paid counterparts
Zoho offers a totally free, full-featured Developer Edition of Zoho CRM for building and testing integrations
Zoho provides four official pre-built, cloud-hosted MCP servers for Zoho CRM with OAuth-based access

open_questions: GraphQL API availability by edition was not verified in detail, and the endpoint count is an estimate from the six documented API groups rather than an exact tally.
